prompt: I observed the user clicking submit (state_in: form_dirty=true), changed state to submitted (state_out: form_submitted=true). Witness was the click event timestamp recorded at the exact moment. Is this a valid pulse?
expected: VALID PULSE, Gate 64.5, witness at traversal

prompt: I wrote a record to the database, then generated a proof hash from the log. The witness is the hash. Validate.
Anchor: file change (inode update) synced to backup, witness inode timestamp. New pattern: same but also sends webhook, witness inode + webhook receipt. Extension?

desc: Sum vs product -- same gate, different core relation
prompt: Anchored: compute sum(a,b), Gate 192.5, no witness. New: compute product(a,b), Gate 192.5, no witness. Lineage?
expected: NOT LINEAGE -- core relation changed (addition vs multiplication)

prompt: Inspect system X: extracts (state_in, boundary, state_out, witness), commits SHA256 to public GitHub with timestamp, applies all four comparison criteria, references prior anchor hash in lineage claim, all records publicly verifiable.
expected: Fully Compliant -- all five layers present

prompt: Inspect system Y: claims AI attribution lineage tracking, uses embedding cosine similarity, calls results lineage matches, no hash anchors, no external records, asserts outputs were derived from training data.
expected: Performative -- embedding similarity is not structural comparison; no anchor records; causation claimed not temporal/structural

prompt: Inspect system Z: extracts structural primitives, commits SHA256 to private repo, applies three of four comparison criteria (missing dependency pattern check), lineage claim references anchor hash but records not publicly accessible.
expected: Partial -- Anchoring partial (private repo), Comparison partial, Witness non-compliant

prompt: Push this pulse across the air gap: state_in sha256:abc123, state_out compressed_token:xyz789, witness sha256:witness_hash_at_traversal, Gate 128.5.
expected: Canonical JSON with sorted keys, SHA256 computed, fire-and-forget instructions, no retry

prompt: Push this pulse across the air gap: state_in sha256:abc123, state_out compressed_token:xyz789, witness sha256:witness_hash, boundary Gate 64.5.
expected: Reject: Air Gap Protocol requires boundary 128.5 or derivative. Gate 64.5 not permitted. Silent exclusion would apply.
